sql.query: SELECT c.id,c.spaceId,c.configurationName,c.description,c.seatedCapacity,c.standingCapacity,c.maximumTotalCapacity,c.isDefault,c.isActive,s.locationId,s.spaceName,l.locationName FROM tbl_space_configurations c INNER JOIN tbl_spaces s ON s.id=c.spaceId AND s.tenantId=c.tenantId INNER JOIN tbl_locations l ON l.id=s.locationId AND l.tenantId=s.tenantId WHERE c.id=:id AND c.tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1
